name: Felarx
description: The Felarx invokes ancient times when aristocrats hunted game. For ceremonies, Orokin elites bred creatures reminiscent of game birds to reanimate cultural myths. They gave the Zariman crew Felarx and a brace of birds as a sign of acceptance into elite society. The brace of birds becomes a pair of pistols at the hands of the Void.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Felarx invokes ancient times when aristocrats hunted game. For ceremonies, Orokin elites bred creatures reminiscent of game birds to reanimate cultural myths. components.name: Voidgel Orb
components.description:
A sample of ambient Void energy distilled into a neutral state.

Location: Zariman

components.name: Voidplume Pinion
components.description:
A Void Angel's living feather, ripped out in combat.

Location: Zariman

components.name: Voidplume Quill
components.description:
A symbol of genius, fallen from Void Angels long ago.

Location: Zariman

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the “Dual-Mode Chamber” and “Mounting Momentum” Felarx Evolution III perks not working. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1325938-felarx-evolution-3-dual-Mode-chamber-mounting-momentum-are-not-working-investigating/page/2/#comment-12641949

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors counting towards the Felarx’s Mounting Momentum Evolution III perk.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Laetum and Felarx gaining charges in their Incarnon form from headshots while Xata’s Whisper is active.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Felarx
Felarx Incarnon Form changes: 
These changes were made thanks to Community Feedback that the Felarx was struggling compared to other Incarnon weapons in its class. 
Fixed frame rate-dependent animation reload inconsistencies with the Felarx.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.6.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Felarx in its Incarnon mode being able to generate and maintain charge from its shots. Charge is only built up while out of Incarnon mode. 
Fixed Felarx’s reload FX not applying custom Energy colors.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Made the shells from the Felarx spiral as they fly through the air during reload. It's so fast that probably no one except Ultraclocked will notice. This one's for you, Ultraclocked.
Reduced clip flare for Laetum and Felarx to help show underlying animation.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Felarx’s Incarnon mode pistols using the wrong model. They have been updated to their intended Void look! 
Fixed Felarx’s firing position projectile not spawning from the barrel. 
Fixed the Felarx’s shells maintaining the default color instead of custom colors for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: The Felarx invokes ancient times when aristocrats hunted game. For ceremonies, Orokin elites bred creatures reminiscent of game birds of old to reanimate cultural myths. The Orokin gave the Zariman crew Felarx and a brace of birds as a sign of acceptance into elite society. The brace of birds becomes a pair of powerful pistols at the hands of the Void.
